subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-25 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The wise one does not counter the corrupt with a more corrupt person. In their desire to counter foreign encroachment
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان عاقل دفع فاسد بافسد نکند ایرانی که بهیچوجه استعداد نداشت
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
